creator: shanee@augusta.de
text:
the port tkdiff is out of date, here is the new version. Also is
	in the port a file called tkdiff. This is now in the name of the
	port, tkcvs-6.0+tkdiff-1.0 . In the original source, there is no
	tclIndex file, so I build one and put it in the file directory.

	I put the port as uue at the end of this mail, I hope this is 
	o.k. so ...

	If it work correct for you, please submit it for me ...
